title: large virtual memory spike on BLOB column select
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE blob_table(v_blob BYTEA, id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO blob_table (v_blob, id, name) VALUES (decode('large_blob_data', 'escape'), DEFAULT, 'Test Blob 1');
INSERT INTO blob_table (v_blob, id, name) VALUES (decode('another_large_blob_data', 'escape'), DEFAULT, 'Test Blob 2');
SELECT * FROM blob_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM blob_table WHERE name LIKE 'Test%');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM blob_table WHERE v_blob IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: selecting large BLOBs causes virtual memory spike
